content.question: What is the fiscal magnitude of resources following students into 6/8-year gimnaziums relative to the total education budget, and do feeder (standard 8-year) primary schools receive any compensatory funding or peer-composition adjustments?
content.reduction_path: Conduct a detailed fiscal mapping study: trace capitation flows by student cohort, school type, and selection status for a representative year; audit local education authority records for any compensatory adjustments or supplements to schools losing high-performing students; model the present-value cost difference between a student pathway in a selective track versus remaining in a standard primary school.
